title: $finish doesn't stop the simulation immediately when called inside `always` block
body:
`verilator --version`: Verilator 5.036 2025-04-27 rev v5.036
OS: ArchLinux

I have the following code:
```sv
module tb2 ();
    parameter CLK_PERIOD = 2;

    reg clk = 1'b0;

    always #(CLK_PERIOD / 2) clk = ~clk;

    always begin
        int counter = 0;
        while (counter < 3) begin
            counter += 1;
            $display("running loop %d", counter);
            @(posedge clk);
        end

        $finish;
    end
endmodule
```

I would expect the following output:
```
running loop           1
running loop           2
running loop           3
- tb2.sv:16: Verilog $finish
```

But the actual output is this:
```
running loop           1
running loop           2
running loop           3
- tb2.sv:16: Verilog $finish
running loop           1
```

We tested the exact same testbench on Xsim and it works as expected.
